description: Norfolk, Va., aboard USS Harry S. Truman (CVN 75) Oct. 9, 2002 -- Joe Perry, a member of the internationally renowned rock band "Aerosmith," signs a ball cap for a Sailor during their visit aboard the U.S. Navy's newest aircraft carrier. Aerosmith boarded and toured Truman while the carrier was pier side at Norfolk Naval Station. The band had returned to perform in the area, having cancelled their original performance scheduled for September 11, 2001. U.S. Navy photo by Photographer's Mate 3rd Class Christopher B. Stoltz. (RELEASED)
